markdown:
# Winged Boots

These boots have 4 charges and regain 1d4 expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the boots, you can take a [[magic]] action to expend 1 charge, gaining a [[fly_speed]] of 30 feet for 1 hour. If you are flying when the duration expires, you descend at a rate of 30 feet per round until you land.
